item.title: OG Pitch meeting by barbell pitch meeting 😆
item.description:
🔥 OG Pitch Meeting | Telugu y 🔥
What if OG was pitched in a meeting room before production? 😆 In this episode of Pitch Meetings, we take a hilarious look at the story, characters, and mass moments from OG starring Pawan Kalyan.
From over-the-top action sequences to unexpected plot twists, nothing escapes our Pitch Meeting treatment! Sit back and enjoy this fun parody packed with Telugu humor and movie satire.
⚠️ This video is made purely for entertainment and parody purposes.
🔥 OG Pitch Meeting | తెలుగు 🔥
OG సినిమా షూటింగ్‌కి ముందే Pitch Meeting జరిగితే ఎలా ఉండేది? 😆 ఈ వీడియోలో OG కథ, పాత్రలు, మాస్ ఎలివేషన్స్, లాజిక్ మోమెంట్స్ అన్నింటినీ సరదాగా ట్రోల్ చేస్తూ Pitch Meeting స్టైల్‌లో చూపించాం.
పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ ఫ్యాన్స్‌కి, తెలుగు సినిమా ప్రేమికులకి ఇది ఫుల్ ఎంటర్‌టైన్మెంట్!
⚠️ ఈ వీడియో పూర్తిగా వినోదం మరియు పేరడీ కోసం మాత్రమే రూపొందించబడింది.
#OG #PawanKalyan #OGPitchMeeting #BarbellPitchMeetings #TeluguCinema #Tollywood #MovieReview #Comedy #Parody #OGMovie #barbell #barbellpitchmeetings #telugucinema #moviereview

item.title: Movie Review: 'Masters of the Universe’ (2026)
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 5th is ‘Masters of the Universe’, which is the second live-action film based on Mattel’s popular toy line and was directed by Travis Knight (‘Bumblebee’).The new film stars Nicholas Galitzine (‘The Sheep Detectives’) as Prince Adam / He-Man, Camila Mendes (‘Palm Springs’) as Teela, Idris Elba (‘Pacific Rim’) as Man-At-Arms, Morena Baccarin (‘Deadpool’) as the Sorceress, Alison Brie (‘Together’) as Evil-Lyn, Jared Leto (‘Morbius’) as Skeletor, and Kristen Wiig (‘Wonder Woman 1984’) as the voice of Roboto.

item.title: 🚨 BJP vs TMC | Mamata Banerjee Hospital Drama Exposed | ATT@CK ON ABHISHEK BANERJEE | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 BJP vs TMC | Mamata Banerjee Hospital Drama Exposed | ATT@CK ON ABHISHEK BANERJEE | | VR Raja
కలకత్తా వీధుల్లో మమతా బెనర్జీ మేనల్లుడు అభిషేక్ బెనర్జీ (Abhishek Banerjee) పై జరిగిన ఘోరమైన రాళ్ల దాడి వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు కుట్ర ఏంటి? ఇది బీజేపీ ప్లాన్ చేశారా లేక టీఎంసీ (TMC) అంతర్గత వర్గపోరుకి నిదర్శనమా?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, West Bengal politics ni shake chestunna recent attacks and high-drama events gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. 1990 lo Mamata Banerjee ki thagilina debba aameni CM ni chesindi, mari ippudu 2026 lo Abhishek Banerjee ki helmet pranalu kapadina incident TMC ki kalisi ostunda leka poorthiga mumpu ki daritheesthunda?
In this deep dive into the bloody politics and massive financial crisis of West Bengal, we cover: 🔸 The Attack Breakdown: A minute-by-minute account of how CID summons led Abhishek Banerjee to a hostile mob in Sonarpur, facing black flags, broomsticks, and a brutal stone-pelting attack. 🔸 The Hospital Drama: The controversy at Belle Vue hospital where doctors declared Abhishek had no serious injuries, leading to viral audio clips of Mamata Banerjee threatening the hospital CEO. 🔸 The Shocking Twist: How BJP IT Cell Chief Amit Malviya exposed that the attackers were not BJP workers, but close associates of former TMC MLA Lovely Maitra, revealing deep internal factionalism. 🔸 The TMC Collapse: Analyzing the mass resignation of 9 TMC councillors in Diamond Harbour, the boycott of Mamata's emergency meeting by 60 MLAs, and the public vandalism of relief funds hidden in a TMC MP's office. 🔸 Suvendu Adhikari's New Era: The fast-track decisions of the new BJP Chief Minister, from canceling religion-based schemes to executing border fencing in 45 days. 🔸 The Rs 85,000 Crore Danger: Why the newly launched "Annapurna Yojana" (replacing Lakshmi Bhandar) could push West Bengal's already debt-ridden economy into a catastrophic fiscal crisis.
Asalu ee internal politics and economic burden valla Bengal future em avvabotundi anukuntunnaru? Mee opinion kinda comment cheyandi!

item.title: 10 Most Powerful Astras in Hinduism | Why Brahmastra Was Not Number One
item.description:
Everyone knows about Brahmastra. But was it really the most powerful astra in Hinduism? In this video, I take you through the 10 most powerful astras from the Mahabharata, Ramayana and ancient Indian tradition.
From Karna’s Vasavi Shakti to Indrajit’s Nagapasha, from the Vaishnavastra that only Krishna could stop to the terrifying Brahmashirastra fired at Uttara’s unborn child, each weapon came with immense power and even greater consequences.
You will also discover why Arjuna received Shiva’s Pashupatastra but never used it, how Krishna used Sudarshana Chakra against Shishupala, and why the final weapon on this list is not what most people expect.
Because the real lesson of these astras is not destruction. It is restraint.
Subscribe to Temple Girl for more stories from India’s temples, scriptures and ancient wisdom.
Jai Shri Krishna.

In this video, Aye Jude explains the officially confirmed BrahMos Missile defense deal between India and Philippines, highlighting India's growing role in the global defense market. The video also discusses ongoing defense negotiations with Vietnam and Indonesia, reportedly worth hundreds of millions of dollars. Aye Jude explains how several countries have shown interest in acquiring BrahMos systems due to their strategic capabilities. The episode also covers comments made by a Serbian leader regarding India and examines claims that sparked debate online. Additionally, it discusses the JF-17 Thunder, jointly developed by Pakistan and China, and their efforts to export it internationally. With defense deals becoming a key tool of diplomacy, how far can India expand its influence in the global arms market? item.title: Spider-Noir
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spider-Noir.

Spider-Noir tells the story of Ben Reilly, a seasoned, down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, who is forced to grapple with his past life, following a deeply personal tragedy, as the city's one and only superhero.

item.title: Ponies
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ponies.

Moscow, 1977. Two "PONIES" ("persons of no interest" in intelligence speak) work anonymously as secretaries in the American Embassy. That is until their husbands are killed under mysterious circumstances in the USSR, and the pair become CIA operatives. Bea is an over educated, Russian speaking child of Soviet immigrants. Her cohort, Twila, is a small town girl who is as abrasive as she is fearless. Together, they work to uncover a vast Cold War conspiracy and solve the mystery that made them widows in the first place.

item.description:

Title : 🚨FAKE 500 NOTES ENTER INDIA? 🇮🇳| This Is BIG | Aye Jude✊🏼
In this video, Aye Jude explains how the Iran–America conflict has continued for nearly three months, resulting in heavy human and economic losses. The war has disrupted global trade routes near the Strait of Hormuz, affecting supply chains and pushing oil prices higher worldwide. The video also discusses reports of a possible understanding between Iran and the United States, along with the huge financial burden created by the conflict. Aye Jude further explains how rising fuel prices could impact common people and businesses across many countries. The episode also covers concerns about counterfeit ₹500 notes allegedly entering India and the challenges this creates for authorities. With economic pressures increasing both globally and domestically, what impact will these developments have on ordinary citizens in the coming months? item.title: Relate ayyara 🤔. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #funny
item.description:
In this deeply insightful conversation, Dr. Vinay Kumar Salavadi from Treatment Range Hospitals explains how many everyday habits that people casually ignore are silently damaging their gut health. From spending too much time in the washroom and ignoring bloating or gas, to depending on ENO, tea, coffee, and soft drinks for temporary relief, this episode uncovers the hidden reasons behind many common stomach and digestion problems.
We also discuss sensitive but extremely important topics like blood during motions, piles, acidity, constipation, burping, and what your poop can actually reveal about your overall health. Dr. Vinay shares real experiences from his medical practice, including shocking cases, dangerous surgeries, and the most common gut issues he sees regularly in patients today.
The conversation also explores modern painless treatments for piles, the difference between Indian and Western toilets, food digestion timing, and why certain food combinations like biryani with coke may be far more harmful than people realize. Along with practical lifestyle advice and simple remedies, this podcast is filled with powerful insights that can genuinely help you understand and protect your gut health better.
Watch till the end for some eye opening health advice that most people have never heard before.

item.description:

దశాబ్దాలుగా ప్రపంచాన్ని వణికిస్తున్న బెర్ముడా ట్రయాంగిల్ (Bermuda Triangle) మిస్టరీ నిజంగానే సాల్వ్ అయిపోయిందా? ఏలియన్స్, అట్లాంటిస్ లాంటి థియరీస్ వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు లాజిక్ ఏంటి? 2026 లో సైంటిస్టులు కనుగొన్న ఆ 12 మైళ్ళ రాతి పడవ రహస్యం ఏంటి? In this ultimate documentary-style breakdown of the world's biggest ocean mystery, we cover: 🔸 The Historical Origins: From Christopher Columbus's strange compass readings to the deepest point in the Atlantic Ocean (Milwaukee Depth). 🔸 The Mega Naval Tragedies: The horrifying disappearances of massive ships like the USS Cyclops (542-foot ship with 309 crew) and the Ghost Ship Carroll A. Deering. 🔸 Flight 19 & Air Mysteries: The truth behind the 5 missing TBM Avenger bombers, Captain Taylor's massive blunder, and Bruce Gernon's impossible 47-minute flight through an "Electronic Fog". 🔸 The Rogue Waves Theory: Oceanographer Dr. Simon Boxall's 2025 practical experiment proving how 100-foot massive rogue waves can snap a giant ship in two within minutes. 🔸 The 2026 Breakthrough: The shocking research published in Geophysical Research Letters revealing a 12-mile-thick geological "Raft" under Bermuda, formed during the Supercontinent Pangea era, keeping the island afloat for 30 million years! item.title: 🚨AMIT SHAH HUGE Decision💥 | On Siliguri Corridor🗺️ | Aye Jude✊🏼
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
Title : 🚨AMIT SHAH HUGE Decision💥 | On Siliguri Corridor🗺️ | Aye Jude✊🏼
In this video, Aye Jude explains recent statements from Norway regarding security partnerships in Europe and the concept of a Nuclear Umbrella, where a country's defense is protected by the nuclear capabilities of an ally. The video breaks down what a nuclear umbrella means and why it is becoming a topic of discussion in global geopolitics. It also covers the growing demand for Indian mangoes in Japan and reports of restrictions affecting mango exports. Meanwhile, Amit Shah’s comments on illegal immigration from Bangladesh have sparked widespread debate on social media. The discussion also highlights the strategic importance of the Siliguri Corridor, often called the "Chicken's Neck" of India. The video connects trade, security, and border issues to explain their broader impact on the country. With geopolitical tensions and border concerns growing, how will India balance security, diplomacy, and economic interests in the years ahead? Sources: https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/ahmedabad/it-is-govts-resolve-to-remove-every-illegal-immigrant-amit-shah/articleshow/131377144.cms

https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/no-case-if-you-exit-voluntarily-amit-shah-tells-bangladesh-illegals/articleshow/131377421.cms

item.title: 😂😅RAO GARU OCHARUUU‼️ | Ft. SATYADEV | Telugu Podcast | Raw Talks With VK |
item.description:
He left Vizag with nothing but a dream. Years later, that dream has a name — Satyadev.
Satyadev didn't walk into the film industry. He crawled in - failed aptitude tests, no connections, juggling jobs just to survive, auditioning for Jyothi Lakshmi while counting every rupee, and working on films that didn't even pay him.
But he stayed. And that stubbornness built a career.
In this episode, he takes us through all of it - the Vizag streets that shaped him, the Hyderabad grind that tested him, and the moment he decided to remove one word from his life forever: doubt. He talks about Bluff Master - how it landed, what went wrong, and the truth nobody says out loud: that a single bad film doesn't just underperform at the box office. It quietly follows an actor everywhere, closing doors and shrinking opportunities in ways audiences never see. He talks about Fridays - the dread, the silence, the waiting. About standing next to Chiranjeevi on Godfather and what that weight actually feels like. About becoming a father and suddenly seeing every script differently. About the humiliation that still stings. The backstabbing. The RGV tweet. And then there's Samvarthi - five hours in a makeup chair, transforming into something that doesn't look human, and somehow finding stillness in it. Because for Satyadev, acting isn't performance. It's meditation. This one's not a promo. It's a story. . Disclaimer: This video is for educational purposes only. The opinions expressed by the guests are their personal views and do not reflect our stance. We have no intention of defaming or harming any individual, brand, product, country, or profession mentioned in this video. Our aim is to provide information to help the audience make informed decisions.
~ 00:00:00 Introduction 00:02:36 Satyadev's Roots in Vizag 00:07:03 The Journey from Vizag to Hyderabad 00:18:19 Moving to Hyderabad for Work 00:22:37 Earning a Red Hat Certification 00:30:28 Balancing a Job While Pursuing Acting 00:33:04 Auditioning for Jyothi Lakshmi 00:35:51 Physical Transformation for a Role 00:38:23 The Pulsar Story 00:44:42 Working Without Pay - The Early Struggle 00:50:51 The Pressure Every Actor Feels on Release Day 00:53:15 Behind the Scenes of Bluff Master 01:04:16 Uma Maheshwara Ugra Roopasya - The Experience 01:05:33 Choosing the Right Films 01:08:36 Preparation and Efforts Behind Each Role 01:11:37 Dealing with Age Pressure in the Film Industry 01:15:02 Navigating Movie Promotions 01:15:50 The Importance of Acting Workshops 01:19:02 Working Alongside Established Actors and Directors 01:21:00 The Experience of Working with Chiranjeevi 01:25:40 Godfather - On Set and Beyond 01:30:47 Rao Bahadur - The Role and the Craft 01:34:10 Samvarthi - Man vs. Man-Eater 01:35:41 Five Hours in Makeup - The Transformation Process 01:40:44 How Fatherhood Changed His Approach to Scripts 01:51:00 What Sets Satyadev Apart as an Actor 01:57:29 A Humiliation He Has Never Forgotten 01:59:39 Understanding the Producer's Perspective 02:05:05 Risk Appetite in a Competitive Industry 02:16:01 The People Who Believed in Him the Most ~

item.title: 🚨 INDIA'S MASTER PLAN AMIT SHAH WARNING | Smart Border & Nationwide Illegal Deportation | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 INDIA'S MASTER PLAN AMIT SHAH WARNING | Smart Border & Nationwide Illegal Deportation | VR Raja
Description పాకిస్తాన్ మరియు బంగ్లాదేశ్ బోర్డర్స్ ని పూర్తిగా సీల్ చేయడానికి ఇండియా (India) చేపడుతున్న "స్మార్ట్ బోర్డర్" ప్రాజెక్ట్ ఏంటి? ఫేక్ ఐడిలతో వేల కోట్లు దోచేస్తున్న ఇల్లీగల్స్ ని ఇండియన్ గవర్నమెంట్ ఎలా దేశం దాటిస్తోంది? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com Ee video lo, recent ga Indian Government border security kosam tesukunna massive and shocking decisions gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. Pakistan border daggara illegal structures ni enduku demolish chestunnaru? AI cameras, drones, and fiber optics tho 6000 km "Smart Border" ni ela tayaru chestunnaru? In this deep dive into India's ultimate national security and border management strategies, we cover: 🔸 The Bikaner Review Meeting: Amit Shah's order to demolish all illegal structures within 15 km of the Pakistan border to destroy smuggling and terror logistics hubs. 🔸 Financial & Terror Networks: How terrorists use fake documentation to create mule accounts, and the urgent order for District Magistrates to verify border-area businesses. 🔸 The Smart Border Project: A detailed breakdown of the high-tech electric wall covering 6000 km, featuring AI-enabled surveillance, UAVs, ground sensors, and real-time command centers. 🔸 The Bengal Crackdown: The impact of Suvendu Adhikari's "Detect, Delete, Deport" movement in West Bengal and how the cancellation of the Lakshmir Bhandar scheme exposed millions of illegal beneficiaries. 🔸 Nationwide Deportation: How the IAF (Indian Air Force) is being used to transport detained illegal immigrants from states like Delhi, Gujarat, and Maharashtra back to the Bangladesh border. 🔸 The Trigger Factors: Why the Pahalgam terror attack and the shifting political landscape in Bangladesh (China's influence) forced India to take these aggressive steps now. Asalu illegals ni detect cheyadaniki inka elanti strict rules thevali anukuntunnaru? Mee opinion kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #SmartBorderIndia #IllegalImmigration #BorderSecurityForce #GeopoliticsTelugu #NationalSecurity #CurrentAffairsTelugu

item.title: 🚨 Full podcast out now on Lazy Muscle channel #telugupodcast #lazymuscle
item.description:
In this deeply insightful conversation, Dr. Vinay Kumar Salavadi from Treatment Range Hospitals explains how many everyday habits that people casually ignore are silently damaging their gut health. From spending too much time in the washroom and ignoring bloating or gas, to depending on ENO, tea, coffee, and soft drinks for temporary relief, this episode uncovers the hidden reasons behind many common stomach and digestion problems.
We also discuss sensitive but extremely important topics like blood during motions, piles, acidity, constipation, burping, and what your poop can actually reveal about your overall health. Dr. Vinay shares real experiences from his medical practice, including shocking cases, dangerous surgeries, and the most common gut issues he sees regularly in patients today.
The conversation also explores modern painless treatments for piles, the difference between Indian and Western toilets, food digestion timing, and why certain food combinations like biryani with coke may be far more harmful than people realize. Along with practical lifestyle advice and simple remedies, this podcast is filled with powerful insights that can genuinely help you understand and protect your gut health better.
Watch till the end for some eye opening health advice that most people have never heard before.
#GutHealth #DigestiveHealth #Constipation #Piles #GasProblems #Burping #Bloating #Acidity #ENO #MotionProblems #BloodInStool #GymDiet #ProteinDigestion #Biryani #IndianFood #HealthyGut #BathroomHabits #ToiletHealth #WesternToilet #IndianToilet #LazyMuscle #LazyMuscleChannel #HealthTalk #fitnessindia

item.description:

Title : 🚨TRUMP Is DURANDHAR💥 | His Plan For PAKISTAN Is🇵🇰 🤯 | Aye jude✊🏼
In this video, Aye Jude explains the background of the Abraham Accords, which aimed to improve relations between Israel and several Middle Eastern nations. The episode discusses the connection between the three Abrahamic religions Judaism, Christianity, and Islam and why the issue remains sensitive in the region. It also explains how countries like United Arab Emirates, Bahrain, and Morocco signed the agreement, while many others have not. The video further touches on views held in Pakistan regarding Israel and the Palestine issue. Alongside this, Aye Jude discusses recent U.S. strikes on Iran and statements by Donald Trump regarding enriched uranium and rising tensions. The episode connects religion, diplomacy, and global politics to explain the larger conflict in the Middle East. With tensions increasing and alliances shifting, could the region be moving toward a bigger geopolitical turning point? item.title: 🚨TRUMP TWIST TO PAKISTAN | How America Trapped Pakistan in the Middle East War | VR Raja Explains
item.description:
🚨TRUMP TWIST TO PAKISTAN | How America Trapped Pakistan in the Middle East War | VR Raja Explains
అమెరికా ప్రెసిడెంట్ ట్రంప్ పాకిస్తాన్ కి ఇచ్చిన ఆ సీక్రెట్ వార్నింగ్ ఏంటి? ఇరాన్ యుద్ధం ఆపాలంటే ముస్లిం దేశాలు ఇజ్రాయెల్ ని యాక్సెప్ట్ చేయాలా? పెట్రోల్ రేట్లు మళ్లీ పెరుగుతాయా? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com Ee video lo, present geopolitics ni shake chestunna US President Donald Trump gari conference call gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. Iran war aapalante 'Abraham Accords' meeda sign cheyali ani Trump pettina condition valla Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, and UAE enduku shock ayyayi? In this deep dive into the Middle East crisis and its global impact, we cover: 🔸 The Midnight Hammer: Analyzing the joint US and Israel airstrikes on Iran's nuclear facilities (Fordo, Natanz, Isfahan) and the destruction of the Bandar Abbas naval base. 🔸 The Trump Ultimatum: The shocking details of the May 23rd conference call where Trump demanded that Middle Eastern leaders, including Pakistan's Asim Munir, officially recognize Israel. 🔸 What are Abraham Accords? Breaking down the historic 2020 agreement where countries like UAE and Bahrain normalized relations with Israel, completely bypassing the Palestine issue. 🔸 Pakistan's Dilemma: Why recognizing Israel is a "political suicide" for Pakistan, risking massive nationwide riots by groups like Jamaat-e-Islami and supporters of Imran Khan. 🔸 The Economic Threat: If Pakistan rejects the deal, how the US can crush its economy by blocking IMF bailouts and using the FATF grey list. 🔸 Impact on India: The reality of soaring Brent crude oil prices ($115-$120), the competition with China for Russian oil, and why Indians should prepare for inflation and rising petrol prices. Asalu Pakistan ee Abraham accords ki oppukuntunda leka US aid vadulukuntunda? Mee opinion kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #GeopoliticsTelugu #MiddleEastCrisis #TrumpNews #IranWar #PakistanCrisis #AbrahamAccords #IndianEconomy

Indian racism in the United States is REAL — and it's getting worse.
From far-right edgelords dropping "cow poop" restaurant stunts and fashwave Hitler birthday anthems, to politicians and influencers fanning the flames — this video breaks down the ugly truth with receipts.

Indians are one of the most successful immigrant groups in America — yet certain circles treat us like second-class citizens. Time to stop pretending it’s “just jokes.”
This isn’t about all Americans. It’s about calling out real bigotry when we see it.

Biggest Storm In 150 Years 🤯
ఓం నమః శివాయ 🕉️ #shiva #sivayya #telugupodcast
Mystery of YAGANTI NANDA revealed | Dr.Siva Nagi Reddy | #telugupodcast
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.
Watch this exclusive conversation with archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy and host Rohit Gollena only on lazymuscle. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more deep conversations on Indian history, culture, spirituality, archaeology, and untold mysteries.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #drsivanagireddy #indianhistory #templemysteries #sanatanadharma #varanasi #yaganti #arunachalam #brihadeeswaratemple #saraswatiriver #hindutemples #archaeology #telugu #podcast #ancientindia #spirituality #hinduculture

item.title: 🚨2026- HEAT ALERT🥵 ‼️El Nino Explained🗒️ | Aye Jude✊🏼
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
Title : 🚨2026- EL NINO HEAT ALERT🥵 ‼️El Nino Explained🗒️ | Aye Jude✊🏼
In this video, Aye Jude explains the global climate phenomenon called El Niño and why scientists are closely monitoring it for 2026 and 2027. The video explains how El Niño was first noticed by fishermen in South America and how it can impact weather conditions across the world. Experts warn that a stronger El Niño could lead to record-breaking temperatures, heatwaves, droughts, cyclones, crop damage, and unusually heavy rainfall in many countries. The episode also highlights the possible effects on India, including changing monsoon patterns, rising electricity usage, and growing water management challenges. Aye Jude further explains why preparation and planning are becoming increasingly important as climate conditions become more unpredictable. The video connects global climate science with everyday impacts people may soon experience. If scientists are already giving warnings now, is the world truly ready to face the climate challenges ahead? Sources: https://www.downtoearth.org.in/climate-change/south-west-monsoon-rainfall-to-be-below-normal-or-deficient-in-2026 https://edition.cnn.com/2026/05/14/weather/super-el-nino-climate https://www.ndtv.com/business-news/fuel-price-hike-heat-risk-el-nino-high-food-prices-inflation-monsoon-iran-war-nithin-kamath-india-economy-gdp-11548013 https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/pune/strong-el-nio-may-peak-this-year-and-weaken-before-indias-2027-monsoon-say-meteorologists/articleshow/131285383.cms https://wmo.int/media/news/wmo-likelihood-increases-of-el-nino

item.description:

పెహల్గామ్ ఎటాక్ వెనుక ఉన్న చైనా (China) హస్తం ఏంటి? నేపాల్ మరియు బంగ్లాదేశ్ లు ఇండియాకి ఎందుకు ఎదురు తిరుగుతున్నాయి? చైనా వేస్తున్న "స్ట్రింగ్ ఆఫ్ పెర్ల్స్" ఉచ్చు నుండి ఇండియా ఎలా తప్పించుకోబోతోంది? Pahalgam attack and Operation Sindoor time lo Pakistan ki China elanti military and tactical support ichindo thelusukundam. In this deep dive into the hidden wars and border tensions surrounding India, we cover: 🔸 The Pahalgam Attack Evidence: How the NIA uncovered a US-made GoPro camera shipped from China to LeT terrorists, along with Chinese-origin AK-47s and encrypted communication tools. 🔸 Operation Sindoor Secrets: The shocking revelation from Chinese CCTV that AVIC engineers were present in Pakistan, guiding them using the Beidou navigation system and realigning satellites against India. 🔸 Bangladesh Border Clashes: The recent standoff between the Indian BSF and Bangladesh BGB over border fencing, and the alarming China-backed drone manufacturing factory being built near the Indian border. 🔸 Nepal's Shift to China: Why the new Balen Shah government in Nepal is promoting a "Greater Nepal" map, rejecting the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra route, and leaning heavily towards Chinese infrastructure loans. 🔸 The Dalai Lama Warning: China's strict warning to India regarding the reincarnation of the 90-year-old Dalai Lama and the fight for control over Tibetan Buddhism. 🔸 String of Pearls vs Necklace of Diamonds: A massive breakdown of China's strategy to encircle India with ports and military bases, and how India is countering it through QUAD, Act East Policy, and naval dominance. Title : 🚨Jaishankar Schools Marco Rubio In PUBLIC😬 | Indirect Reply To TRUMP🔥
In this video, Aye Jude explains the recent press meet held after Marco Rubio’s visit to India, where he and S. Jaishankar discussed topics like migration, visas, visa restrictions, and India–U.S. relations. During the interaction, Rubio stated that “our nation comes first,” to which Jaishankar responded that India would also always prioritize its own national interests. The video also revisits the controversy involving a Norwegian journalist questioning Narendra Modi, and the later press briefing where India’s spokesperson faced criticism over the response. It further discusses reports about U.S. interest in energy and mining projects in regions near Baluchistan in Pakistan. The episode connects these developments to larger geopolitical strategies involving America, Pakistan, and India. Diplomatic language, strategic investments, and media controversies all become part of the discussion. With global powers balancing diplomacy and national interests, what bigger strategy is unfolding behind these meetings? item.title: 🚨 EBOLA V*RUS OUT BREAK Explained | GLOBAL EMERGENCY DECLARED | IS INDIA SAFE | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 EBOLA V*RUS OUT BREAK Explained | GLOBAL EMERGENCY DECLARED | IS INDIA SAFE | VR Raja
కరోనా మర్చిపోకముందే ప్రపంచాన్ని వణికిస్తున్న మరో మహమ్మారి ఎబోలా! దీనికి ఎందుకు మందు లేదు? ఇది ఇండియాకి వస్తుందా? డీటెయిల్డ్ ఫాక్ట్స్!For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations:📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.comEe video lo, Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) mariyu Uganda lo start ayina kotha Ebola outbreak gurinchi matladukundam. World Health Organization (WHO) enduku deenni 'Public Health Emergency of International Concern' (PHEIC) ga declare chesindi? Asalu ee Bundibugyo virus ki vaccine enduku ledu?In this deep dive into the 17th Ebola outbreak and its devastating consequences, we cover:🔸 The Tragic Origin: How a health worker's death in Bunia and initial false-negative tests led to the silent spread of the deadly Bundibugyo virus.🔸 The Six Ebola Variants: Understanding the different strains of Ebola, including Zaire and Sudan, and why the current Bundibugyo strain is so resistant to existing vaccines.🔸 How it Spreads: Demystifying the "Spillover" effect from fruit bats to humans and the harsh reality of transmission through bodily fluids, unlike the airborne COVID-19.🔸 The Terrifying Symptoms: Separating Hollywood myths from reality—why internal bleeding, diarrhea, and organ failure make this virus incredibly fatal.🔸 The Dangerous Delay: Why the 3-week delay in identifying the specific strain caused the virus to spread rapidly into urban centers like Kampala and reach the third-largest outbreak in history.🔸 The Ground Reality: How armed conflicts, rebel groups like M23, and community mistrust regarding cultural funerals are making it impossible to contain the virus.🔸 Risk to India: Analyzing the global threat level and the critical precautions international travelers must take upon returning to India.Asalu ee virus ki thvaraga vaccine vastundhi anukuntunnara? Ee global crisis meeda mee opinion ento kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #EbolaOutbreak #HealthNewsTelugu #BundibugyoVirus #GlobalHealthEmergency #ScienceFactsTelugu

భారతదేశం ఎందుకు మండుతోంది? ప్రపంచంలోని టాప్ 100 అత్యంత వేడి నగరాల్లో 97 ఇండియాలోనే ఎందుకు ఉన్నాయి? ఎల్ నినో (El Niño) ఎఫెక్ట్ వెనుక ఉన్న సైన్స్ ఏంటి?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, India ni vanikistunna extreme heatwaves mariyu daani venuka unna scientific reasons gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. AQI release chesina latest list lo top 100 hottest cities lo 97 Indian cities eh enduku unnayi? Asalu El Niño antentii? Nighttime heat enduku intha dangerous ga marutundi?
In this deep dive into the current climate crisis and its impact on our daily lives, we cover: 🔸 The Shocking Numbers: Analyzing the AQI report where Indian cities dominated the global heat rankings, with temperatures reaching 48°C in places like Sasaram, Bihar. 🔸 What is a Heatwave? Breaking down the IMD's definition of a heatwave and why 37°C in a coastal area like Vizag is as dangerous as 47°C in Rajasthan. 🔸 The Science of El Niño: Explaining how shifting wind patterns in the Pacific Ocean push warm, moist air away from India, causing delayed monsoons and severe dry heat. 🔸 The Hidden Danger (Warm Nights): Why the increase in nighttime temperatures and the "Urban Heat Island" effect prevent the human body from recovering, leading to severe health risks. 🔸 Economic & Job Losses: The devastating impact of heat exposure on street vendors, gig workers, and farmers, leading to massive agricultural and economic losses. 🔸 Telugu States at Risk: Why Andhra Pradesh ranks as the number one heat risk state in India according to CEEW data, and the precautions being taken. 🔸 Safety First: Essential guidelines to stay hydrated, recognize heat stroke symptoms, and show humanity to delivery workers during these extreme temperatures.
Asalu heatwave ni National Disaster ga declare cheyala vadda? Mee opinion kinda comment cheyandi!

item.title: Mystery explained. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.
Watch this exclusive conversation with archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy and host Rohit Gollena only on lazymuscle. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more deep conversations on Indian history, culture, spirituality, archaeology, and untold mysteries.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #drsivanagireddy #indianhistory #templemysteries #sanatanadharma #varanasi #yaganti #arunachalam #brihadeeswaratemple #saraswatiriver #hindutemples #archaeology #telugu #podcast #ancientindia #spirituality #hinduculture

item.title: DAX in Power BI
item.description:
DAX is what separates Power BI users from Power BI developers.
Most people can drag fields onto a canvas and call it a dashboard.
But the moment someone asks for year-over-year growth, a running total, or a metric that respects filters the way the business actually thinks - you need DAX.
And the first real test is knowing when to use a calculated column vs a measure.
Get that wrong and your model bloats, your reports slow down, and your numbers stop making sense when someone clicks a slicer.
Get it right and you stop being the person who builds reports and you become the person who builds models other people build reports on.
____________________________________________

In this deep dive into global economics and India's currency crisis, we cover:
🔸 Supply and Demand Basics: A simple explanation of how currency valuation works and why the demand for dollars is skyrocketing in India. 🔸 The Middle East War Impact: How the disruption in the Strait of Hormuz and the 50% surge in Brent crude oil prices forced India to spend double the dollars on imports. 🔸 FPI Outflows: The staggering withdrawal of over $40 Billion by Foreign Portfolio Investors from Indian equities and its devastating effect on the Rupee. 🔸 The Current Account Deficit: Understanding India's structural problems with oil, gold, and electronics imports overshadowing IT exports. 🔸 The AI Failure: How missing out on the global AI and semiconductor capital rotation made India vulnerable compared to China and Taiwan. 🔸 The 100 Rupee Fear: Analyzing expert opinions from Arvind Panagariya and Gita Gopinath on whether a ₹100/Dollar exchange rate is just a psychological number or a real economic disaster. 🔸 What You Must Do: Practical steps like reducing gold purchases, controlling fuel consumption, and opting for local goods to save our economy.Asalu Rupee 100 hit avtunda leda? item.title: AI Engineer COMPLETE Roadmap [2026]
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: AI Engineer COMPLETE Roadmap [2026]
Learning Resources: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/pa73n
The more I learned about production AI systems, the more I realized that AI Engineering is deeply connected with Cloud, DevOps, backend systems, and infrastructure workflows.
That’s why modern AI Engineering is becoming much more than just prompting or fine-tuning models.
If I had to learn AI Engineering from scratch today, these are the skills I would master.
• Python for automation, APIs, and workflows • Linux + debugging for production systems • APIs + networking for system communication • Cloud + infrastructure for deployment • AI fundamentals for understanding models properly • RAG + LLM systems for modern AI applications • Docker + Kubernetes for scaling workloads • Monitoring + observability for production systems
These are the exact skills that top companies are looking for in AI-focused roles.

item.title: Best Medicine
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Best Medicine.

In Best Medicine a brilliant surgeon leaves Boston to become a small-town doctor where he spent childhood summers. Despite his medical skills, his rude manner alienates locals as he battles hidden phobias and struggles with personal connections.

item.title: Widow's Bay
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Widow's Bay.

Widow's Bay is about a mysteriously cursed New England island and its superstitious citizens, led by a mayor who refuses to believe their warnings.

item.title: Margo's Got Money Troubles
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Margo's Got Money Troubles.

Margo Millet is the daughter of a Hooters waitress and an ex-pro wrestler. Now an unemployed single mother in her early 20s, Margo is struggling to make ends meet, leading her to launch an OnlyFans account. When her father reenters her life, she starts incorporating his lessons from the pro wrestling world into her OnlyFans work, leading to unexpected success.

item.title: Dutton Ranch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Dutton Ranch.

The Dutton Ranch, home to Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler, is a testament to the peace they sought, fought for, and nearly died for, as they've come to cherish their 7,000-acre land. With tough times and stiff competition, Beth and Rip do what they must to survive, all while ensuring Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

As Beth and Rip fight to build a future together - far from the ghosts of Yellowstone - they collide with brutal new realities and a ruthless rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire. In South Texas, blood runs deeper, forgiveness is fleeting, and the cost of survival might just be your soul.

item.title: This is our culture #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #indianhistory
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.
Watch this exclusive conversation with archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy and host Rohit Gollena only on lazymuscle. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more deep conversations on Indian history, culture, spirituality, archaeology, and untold mysteries.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #drsivanagireddy #indianhistory #templemysteries #sanatanadharma #varanasi #yaganti #arunachalam #brihadeeswaratemple #saraswatiriver #hindutemples #archaeology #telugu #podcast #ancientindia #spirituality #hinduculture

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu’
item.description: Opening in theaters on May 22 is ‘Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu,’ directed by Jon Favreau from a screenplay by Favreau, Dave Filoni, and Noah Kloor. The film stars Pedro Pascal ('The Fantastic Four: First Steps'), Jeremy Allen White ('Springsteen: Deliver Me From Nowhere'), Steve Blum ('Transformers One'), Jonny Coyne ('The Toxic Avenger'), Martin Scorsese ('Killers of the Flower Moon'), and Sigourney Weaver ('Avatar: Fire and Ash').

This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.

item.title: Yuvan Case | Reality - IMAKSHAY9
Nataraja Decoded: The Hidden Meaning of Shiva’s Cosmic Dance
item.description:
Have you ever stopped to ask what every part of Nataraja form actually means?
Why is God Shiva dancing? Why does He hold a drum in one hand and fire in another? Who is the small demon under His foot? And why is this form considered one of the deepest visual explanations of the universe?
In this video, we decode the full meaning of Nataraja, the cosmic dancing form of God Shiva.
From the story of the Tillai forest and the sages who forgot surrender, to the demon Apasmara who represents ignorance and forgetfulness, to the five cosmic actions of creation, preservation, destruction, concealment, and grace, every detail of Nataraja carries a profound meaning.
We also explore the Chidambaram connection, the Chidambara Rahasya, the empty space behind the curtain, the Chola bronze tradition, and why Nataraja became a global symbol of the cosmic dance.
This is not just a beautiful bronze figure.
It is philosophy. It is iconography. It is cosmology. It is the universe compressed into one divine form.
Watch till the end, because after this video, you will never look at Nataraja the same way again.
👇 Let us know in the comments: Which detail of Nataraja surprised you the most?
🕉️ Om Namah Shivaya
#Nataraja #Shiva #GodShiva #Chidambaram #NatarajaDecoded #IndianTemples #Hinduism #TempleGirl #ShivaTandava #SanatanaDharma

item.title: The 7 LEVELS Of Cloud DevOps [In 20 Minutes]
item.description:
Level-Wise Learning Resources: https://gdocs.openinapp.co/hwavr
Case Studies: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/vsadhwani_here-are-15-real-world-case-studies-every-share-7413535285701091328-hvEP/
https://www.linkedin.com/posts/vsadhwani_5-case-studies-you-must-read-if-youre-preparing-share-7395883296125005825-iJuq/
In this video, I’ll break down the 7 distinct levels of modern DevOps careers, from entry-level engineers to AI infrastructure and leadership roles.
I’ve covered the skills required at each level, the certifications actually worth pursuing, salary ranges, day-to-day responsibilities, and how expectations evolve as you move from automation and cloud operations into Kubernetes, platform engineering, distributed systems, AIOps, and production AI deployments.
If you’re a student, software engineer, cloud engineer, DevOps engineer, SRE, or someone transitioning into AI infrastructure and platform roles, this video will help you identify your current level and understand exactly what you need to focus on next.
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 00:37 Level 1 04:40 Level 2 07:15 Level 3 09:44 Level 4 11:40 Level 5 13:31 Level 6 15:20 Level 7 16:46 Conclusion
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: 5 Database Types EXPLAINED (For Software Engineer Interviews)
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 5 Database Types EXPLAINED (For Software Engineer Interviews)
The database you choose depends on 2 things: → What your data looks like → How you want to query it
Here are the 5 types that actually matter 👇
1. SQL (Structured + Consistent) Tables, rows, transactions → Best for user data, payments, anything that must be correct
2. NoSQL (Flexible + Scalable) Documents, key-value, massive scale → Best for feeds, chats, logs, large unstructured data
3. Graph DB (Relationships) Nodes + edges → Best for recommendations, “people you may know”, connections
4. Time-Series DB (Data over time) Timestamped events → Best for analytics, monitoring, system metrics
5. Vector DB (AI-native) Embeddings + similarity search → Best for recommendations, semantic search, RAG systems
Different databases solve different problems.
Subscribe for more such breakdowns!

item.title: 🚨 Watch till end #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this powerful episode of the RRRshow, host Rohith Gollena (LazyMuscle) sits down with Major SPS Oberoi, a decorated ex-Army officer known for his discipline, courage, and deep insights into India’s security and history. This Telugu podcast offers a rare and authentic perspective on the untold stories behind India’s wars, intelligence operations, and geopolitical relations that shaped the nation’s destiny. Through gripping storytelling and factual clarity, Major Oberoi walks us through India’s most defining moments — from the chaos of Direct Action Day in Calcutta to the heroic tales from the 1971 India-Pakistan War. He unveils how America’s role in that war affected India’s global standing and how strong alliances like India and Russia’s friendship became crucial for India’s defense and development. This episode also explores India’s long-standing ties with Afghanistan, revealing lesser-known details of cooperation and intelligence exchanges that influenced the region’s stability. The conversation takes a deeper turn as Major Oberoi shares the extraordinary work of Ajit Doval, often referred to as India’s James Bond, and the brilliance behind India’s covert spy network and its training. For those fascinated by defense strategy, espionage, and patriotism, this RRRshow Telugu podcast offers an in-depth look into how India’s intelligence and armed forces operate silently yet powerfully to protect national interests. Rohith Gollena (LazyMuscle) ensures the conversation remains engaging and educational as they discuss how India has evolved into a global superpower, driven by strategic foresight, leadership, and the sacrifices of its unsung heroes. The episode also dives into historical realities that shaped modern India — the true reasons behind how the British left India, the contributions of leaders like Subhash Chandra Bose, Dr. B.R. Ambedkar, Bhagat Singh, and Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, and how their visions collectively led India toward freedom and unity. Major Oberoi also shares his experiences and personal reflections on leadership, motivation, and discipline, giving practical advice for today’s youth. His insights on how to prepare for competitive exams and develop a soldier’s mindset are both inspiring and actionable. As the conversation moves toward the end, he opens up about the best advice he ever received during his service — a lesson in humility, integrity, and resilience that continues to guide his life even today. This LazyMuscle podcast episode is more than just an interview — it’s a masterclass in history, leadership, and national pride. Through every segment, listeners gain a deeper understanding of what it means to serve the nation and how values like discipline and strategy extend beyond the battlefield into everyday life. For Telugu-speaking audiences passionate about India’s history, defense, and world relations, this episode offers an unparalleled experience. It blends raw patriotism with wisdom and storytelling that only someone like Major SPS Oberoi can deliver. From the tales of wartime bravery to the secret workings of India’s intelligence agencies, and from historical revelations to practical life lessons, this episode is a reminder that the story of India is not just about the past — it’s about the spirit that continues to define our future. Watch till the end to hear Major Oberoi’s final advice to viewers — a powerful message that every Indian must listen to.
#indianarmy #indiahistory #militarystories #defense #telugupodcast #lazymuscle #rrrshow #rohithgollena #ajitdoval #indianintelligence #indianarmystories #indiarussiarelations #indiaafghanistanrelations #subhashchandrabose

item.title: The Untold Side of Human Survival 💔 #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #socialjustice
item.description:
In this emotional and thought-provoking episode of the telugu podcast by lazymuscle and RRRshow, host rohith gollena sits down with renowned social activist Sunitha Krishnan to discuss the hidden emotional struggles faced by women trapped inside dark and exploitative environments. This conversation goes beyond public perception and reveals the psychological pain, fear, loneliness, and discomfort many individuals silently carry throughout their lives. Through real experiences and deep social insights, this episode encourages viewers to understand the human side of stories society often ignores.
This telugu podcast explores how emotional trauma, manipulation, survival pressure, social stigma, and fear affect the mental health and daily lives of vulnerable women living in difficult conditions. Sunitha Krishnan explains how many people are forced into situations where they lose freedom, confidence, identity, and emotional safety. The discussion also highlights how society frequently judges people without understanding the circumstances, abuse, or emotional suffering behind their reality.
Throughout this impactful conversation, rohith gollena asks important questions about emotional healing, social rejection, mental trauma, and the long-term psychological effects caused by exploitation and unsafe environments. The episode examines how silence, fear, and lack of support systems continue to affect countless lives even after escape or rehabilitation. These insights make the discussion highly relevant for youth, parents, students, educators, and viewers interested in social awareness content.
Unlike regular interview content, this episode of lazymuscle and RRRshow focuses on empathy, awareness, and understanding the emotional realities hidden beneath society’s surface. Sunitha Krishnan shares powerful observations from years of rescue work, rehabilitation efforts, and direct interaction with survivors. Her perspective gives listeners a rare understanding of the emotional battles many people fight silently every day.
This episode also discusses how awareness, compassion, education, and responsible conversations can help create safer environments for vulnerable individuals. The podcast encourages viewers to stop looking at these issues only through judgment and instead understand the emotional, psychological, and social realities connected to them. It is a conversation designed not just to inform but to emotionally move the audience toward empathy and awareness.
If you enjoy meaningful long-form conversations, emotional storytelling, social reality podcasts, psychological discussions, and awareness-driven content, this episode will deeply impact your perspective. Watch this powerful conversation featuring Sunitha Krishnan and rohith gollena to understand the emotional side of lives society rarely talks about openly.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #socialawareness #emotionalstory #deepconversation #realitypodcast #truthpodcast #humanstories #youthawareness #indianpodcast #motivationpodcast #telugucreator

item.title: 🚨 Mystery No one talks about | Dr.Sunitha Krishnan | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #psychologypodcast #mentalhealthtelugu #childprotection #socialawareness #humanbehavior #telugucreator #educationalpodcast #deeptalks #awarenessmatters #telugucontentcreator

item.title: 🚨 Dark Reality No One Talks About | Dr.Sunitha Krishnan | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #psychologypodcast #mentalhealthtelugu #childprotection #socialawareness #humanbehavior #telugucreator #educationalpodcast #deeptalks #awarenessmatters #telugucontentcreator

item.title: This is how God Krishna came to Vrindavan #krishna #vrindavan #bankebihari
IMPORTANT DevOps Interview Question! Batch Vs. Streaming In Data Processing
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: IMPORTANT DevOps Interview Question! Batch Vs. Streaming In Data Processing
In this short, I’ll break down the difference between batch processing and streaming using a simple Parle-G biscuit analogy.
I’ve covered how batch systems process stored data together, how streaming systems handle data in real time, and where both concepts are used in DevOps, cloud, and AI systems.
If you’re preparing for backend, DevOps, data engineering, or AI interviews, this concept is something you’ll definitely come across.

item.title: Claude Code EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: Claude Code EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
If I had to explain this properly, I’d break Claude Code down into these 4 layers:
Skills - Reusable instruction files Teach Claude how to perform specific tasks once, and reuse forever
CLAUDE.md - Your project memory Defines your stack, rules, and conventions so Claude doesn’t “forget” every session
MCP (Model Context Protocol) - Tool access layer Connects Claude to GitHub, Terraform, APIs so it can actually execute, not just suggest
Agent Mode - Autonomy layer Claude writes → runs → debugs → repeats… without waiting for you
Start thinking in systems, not prompts. ⚠️ But remember: Claude can still be confidently wrong. So, always review.
Subscribe for more such breakdowns!

item.title: The Origin of Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga | Ujjain’s Powerful Shiva Temple
item.description:
Why is Shiva called Mahakal? Why does Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga face south, the direction of Yama? And why does the first ritual of the day begin with ash?
In this video, Temple Girl takes you into the origin story of Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga, the story of the demon Dushana, the devotion of Vedapriya and his sons, and the moment Shiva appeared in Ujjain as Mahakal, the great conqueror of time.
Ujjain was not just an ancient city. It was once the center from which Indian astronomers measured time. And at the heart of this city sits Mahakal, the form of Shiva who does not just mark time, but becomes time itself.
From the legend of Mahakal’s appearance to the mystery of the Bhasma Aarti, this is the story behind Ujjain’s most powerful Shiva temple.
👇 Have you visited Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga in Ujjain? Share your experience in the comments.
If you enjoyed watching this video, subscribe to Temple Girl. We have the stories of all twelve Jyotirlingas coming.
#Mahakaleshwar #Mahakal #Ujjain #MahakaleshwarTemple #Jyotirlinga #BhasmaAarti #KaalBhairav #IndianMystery #HinduMystery #AncientIndia #SpiritualDocumentary #TimeMystery #EnergyVortex #HinduTemples #MahakalEnergy #ShivaMystery #AncientTemples #MysteryDocumentary

A medical expense, appliance issue, or urgent family need can happen anytime, and during those moments, the last thing I’d want is to worry about arranging money quickly.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off.

Scott Pilgrim meets the girl of his dreams, Ramona Flowers, only to find out her seven evil exes stand in the way of their love.

item.title: Memory of a Killer
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Memory of a Killer.

Memory of a Killer is a dramatic thriller about a hitman who develops early onset Alzheimer's. Angelo lives a double life as an assassin and a family man - which all worked out well until he was hit with early onset Alzheimer's. Now his worlds are colliding, putting his family in danger.

item.title: DTF St. Louis
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DTF St. Louis.

DTF St. Louis is a darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action | Power BI Training | Data Analytics
item.description:
In this session, we explore Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action and demonstrate how Power BI transforms raw data into meaningful insights through interactive dashboards.
The session covers how filters, slicers, drill-down features, and dynamic visuals help users explore data and make better business decisions.
This session is conducted by Mr. Prashyuth, who has 13+ years of experience in the IT industry, sharing practical insights on how Power BI is used in real-world projects.
In this session you will learn:
• How interactive Power BI dashboards work • Using filters and slicers effectively • Drill-down analysis in dashboards • Building visually engaging reports • Understanding the Power BI learning path and career opportunities in Data Analytics
If you are interested in learning Power BI and building a career in Data Analytics, this session will give you a clear understanding of the possibilities.

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.
